welcome.title: Welcome to your portal
welcome.subtitle: Follow your case step by step, with your team always close by.

noAccess.title: Let's talk first
noAccess.body: We activate your portal access once you start your case with us. Reach out and we'll give you your login details.

website.title: See our services
website.sub: Everything we do for your family

noAccess.escape: I have my details → View my case

phone.title: Enter with your phone
phone.body: Use the same number you used for your contract. We already have it on file — that's your key to your case.
phone.trustBadge: We recognize your number and open your case instantly.
phone.footerBadge: Only you can see your case.
phone.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
phone.errorInvalidPhone: The phone number is not valid. Please check and try again.
phone.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

otp.title: Enter your code
otp.bodyPrefix: We sent a 6-digit code via SMS to
otp.footerBadge: We verify it's you to protect your case.
otp.errorCode: That code doesn't match. Try again, no rush.
otp.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.

home.subtitle: Here are your active cases.
home.noCases: You have no active cases at this time.

login.title: Team Panel
login.subtitle: Exclusive access for UsaLatinoPrime employees.
login.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait 15 minutes.
login.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.body: Enter your email and we'll send instructions if it belongs to an active employee.
resetPassword.successMessage: If the email belongs to an active employee, you'll receive instructions shortly.

cambiarPassword.title: Create your password
cambiarPassword.body: This is your first access. Choose a secure password to protect your account.
cambiarPassword.requirements: At least 12 characters. Use a mix of letters, numbers and symbols.
cambiarPassword.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters.
cambiarPassword.errorTooWeak: This password is too easy to guess. Try a more varied combination.

stub.comingSoon: This section will be available soon.

dashboard.sub: Here's what's happening in your business today.
dashboard.comingSoon: This section is completed in the next wave.

activityEmpty.title: No activity in this period yet
activityEmpty.sub: Change the range or create your first service to start seeing movement here.

catalog.title: Service catalog
catalog.sub: What your business sells, as configuration — never as code.
catalog.emptySub: Create your first service and sell it today — no developers.
catalog.bannerProd: You're editing a live service: text changes are reflected immediately in the client app.
catalog.archiveConfirmBody: The service will no longer be contractable and will be hidden from the editor. Ongoing cases are unaffected.
catalog.slugLocked: The identifier cannot change: cases already exist for this service.
catalog.entryToggle: It's an entry to another service's phase
catalog.entryNote: The entry service has its own phases, documents, forms and prices — independent of the parent.
catalog.lawyerNote: Automatically enables the legal validation flow for cases that contract it.
catalog.priceNote: Changing the price doesn't affect already signed contracts.
catalog.apptNote: It's the default for new cases; each case can have its own override.
catalog.formStubSub: The form editor (official PDF and AI generation) arrives in phase F4.
catalog.celebrate: 🎉 {service} is now live. Clients see it in the app and Vanessa can create contracts — no deploy needed.
catalog.ackWarning: I understand and want to publish anyway

employees.title: Employees
employees.sub: Your team and what each person can see and do.
employees.emptySub: Create your first employee and invite them to the panel.
employees.emailTaken: An employee with this email already exists.
employees.presetSales: Access to leads, calendar, clients and sales metrics.
employees.presetParalegal: Access to cases, expedientes, validations and calendar.
employees.presetFinance: Access to payments, collections, accounting and printing.
employees.inviteSent: Invitation sent to {email}. The employee will set their password from the email.
employees.matrixHeader: Roles are a starting point, not a limit: you can grant any employee any module.
employees.adminRowNote: Administrators have full access; the matrix doesn't apply to them.
employees.savedToast: Permissions updated. The effect is immediate: the employee's tabs appear or disappear on their next load.
employees.revokeCasesWarn: Their assigned cases will be inaccessible to them until reassigned.
employees.deactivateBody: Access is cut off immediately; history is preserved.
employees.reactivateBody: The employee will be able to log in again with the same permissions.

audit.title: Audit
audit.sub: Immutable record of all team actions.
audit.encryptedNote: Encrypted fields are never shown in plain text.
audit.viewEntityHistory: View full history of this entity
audit.emptyTitle: Every team action will be recorded here
audit.emptySub: When someone creates, edits or publishes something, it will appear in this log.

config.title: Settings
config.sub: Your organization's data, in one place.
config.generalNote: These values feed the app footer, email templates and contact screens — nothing is hardcoded.
config.coversEmptySub: Cover templates are created in the editor (coming soon).
config.coverInactiveNote: Inactive ones aren't offered in the assembler.
config.coverEditNote: Editing a template doesn't alter already generated cover sheets.
config.termsImmutable: Accepted versions are immutable: a new version is created.
config.termsEmptySub: Create the first version of your terms and conditions.
